title: Prison School
sourceNotes: S1 anime (12 eps, 2015) adapts manga chapters 1-82 (partway into the DTO arc; resume reading at ch 83). Paired with Akira Hiramoto's complete manga: the story ends at ch 277 with a ch 277.5 epilogue (28 vols); AniList counts 279 because it lists the '.5' interstitial half-chapters separately, so the final arc extends to 279. The 'Mad Wax' OVA (re-covers ch 82-89) and the live-action drama are excluded. Saga-level boundaries follow the fandom Story Arcs list; the ASSA/DTO sub-split is approximate.

mappings.arc: Underground Student Council Saga (Peeping → ASSA → DTO; anime portion)
DTO Finale → Aboveground Student Council Saga
